# Document Content Registry

**Purpose:** Every downloadable document (PDF forms, disclosures, policies) the built pages currently require. Generated by reading `src/components/website/pages/DocumentCenter/content.ts` directly and extracting every bracketed placeholder document — not written from memory or a generic "what documents does a school need" template. See [README.md](./README.md) for how this registry fits the wider Content Readiness Framework.

**Every item below is a named, empty slot, not a fabricated file.** No filename was invented — each document is identified by its generic type ("Academic Calendar," "Fee Structure"), never a specific file like `academic-calendar-2026.pdf`. The actual PDF, once School Admin supplies it, gets its own real filename at upload time; this registry tracks the requirement, not a guess at what the file will be called.

**Status lifecycle:** `Required → Requested → Received → Approved → Optimized → Published`. Every item below is currently **Required**.

---

## Document Center (`src/components/website/pages/DocumentCenter/content.ts`)

| ID      | Document                                 | Category                     | Priority | Owner        | Status   | Replacement Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ---------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | -------- | ------------ | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| DOC-001 | Admission Form — Nursery to UKG          | Admission Documents          | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — visible today at `/documents`. Blocks a real admission action, same urgency class as `Admissions`' own P0 eligibility facts.                                                                                  |
| DOC-002 | Admission Form — Class I to VIII         | Admission Documents          | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — same section, upper-class form.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| DOC-003 | School Prospectus                        | Admission Documents          | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — useful but not the single blocking document for an enquiry to proceed.                                                                                                                                        |
| DOC-004 | Academic Calendar                        | Academic Documents           | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — overlaps conceptually with `TXT-006` (Academic session, `SCHOOL.academicSession`) but is a distinct downloadable artifact, not the same fact.                                                                 |
| DOC-005 | Syllabus Overview                        | Academic Documents           | P2       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — helpful reference, not decision-blocking for most visitors.                                                                                                                                                   |
| DOC-006 | Holiday List                             | Academic Documents           | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — time-sensitive-adjacent (parents plan around it) without being a full Notice Board item.                                                                                                                      |
| DOC-007 | Affiliation / Recognition Certificate    | Mandatory Public Disclosures | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — trust-critical; also depends on `TXT-001` (`SCHOOL.affiliation`) being confirmed first, since the certificate itself can't be sourced before the affiliation status is known.                                 |
| DOC-008 | Society / Trust Registration Certificate | Mandatory Public Disclosures | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — legally significant, less immediately parent-facing than DOC-007/DOC-009.                                                                                                                                     |
| DOC-009 | Fire & Building Safety Certificate       | Mandatory Public Disclosures | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — safety-critical trust signal for a school serving young children.                                                                                                                                             |
| DOC-010 | Fee Structure                            | Mandatory Public Disclosures | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — a core decision factor for every prospective family; overlaps conceptually with `Admissions`' Fee Information section (no numbers there either), but this is the actual downloadable document, not page copy. |
| DOC-011 | Child Safety & Anti-Ragging Policy       | School Policies              | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — safety-critical, same priority class as DOC-009.                                                                                                                                                              |
| DOC-012 | Fee Refund & Withdrawal Policy           | School Policies              | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — important once a family is enrolled, less urgent pre-enquiry.                                                                                                                                                 |
| DOC-013 | Uniform & Code of Conduct Policy         | School Policies              | P2       | School Admin | Required | **Active placeholder** — lowest urgency of the three policies; genuinely useful but not trust- or safety-critical.                                                                                                                     |

---

## Totals

**13 document items** — all Content, owned by School Admin, all Active placeholders (visible today at `/documents`, none Latent or Silently-absent — this is the first page to reference any document at all). See [CONTENT_DASHBOARD.md](./CONTENT_DASHBOARD.md) for readiness math derived from this table.

## Historical Note

This registry was genuinely empty from the Content Readiness Framework's creation through the Contact & Visit Experience milestone — no built page referenced a downloadable document until the Document Center Experience. The prior "Finding: Zero document requirements identified" text (preserved in version history, not here) was itself correct at the time and is superseded by this table, not silently overwritten — the same evidence-based, generate-don't-invent discipline that produced the original empty finding produced these 13 real rows once a page actually needed them.
